reviewer_notes: Page 473 of the source (MAC address intro, Domain name and DNS section). All body text accurately reproduced. Section headers ドメイン名とDNS and DNSとは present and correctly structured. Only cosmetic losses: ruby phonetic gloss and inline diagram text.
